title: polygonella polygama var. croomii
intro: Polygonella polygama var. croomii, also known as Croom's Polygonella, is a plant species in the Polygonellaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, Polygonella polygama var. croomii is often made into a tea or tincture by infusing its leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
